description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring a clean, minimalist design. The exterior walls are primarily smooth and painted in contrasting black and white tones, with large windows on multiple sides allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house is divided into several rooms, including a kitchen, living area, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all visible through the open floor plan. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and smaller, standard-sized ones. The main entryway is simple, with a flush door and no visible porch or decorative columns, emphasizing the modern aesthetic. The interior appears to use a mix of materials, including wood flooring and tiled surfaces, contributing to a contemporary urban feel.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist black-and-white exterior. The layout features multiple rooms and an open, light-filled design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a black exterior wall with large windows and the main entry door centrally located.
description_view_1: Side view with a white exterior, visible window, and a glimpse into the open-plan living and dining areas.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting additional windows and the living room area, with a mostly white exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a black exterior, smaller window, and clear visibility of the kitchen and dining spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch or decorative elements, emphasizing minimalism
